message:
feat(sync): add Git authentication and branch support for remotes

Implement comprehensive authentication support for Git-based sync remotes,
enabling synchronization with private repositories and custom branches.

New RemoteAuth enum (sync/config.rs):
- Token: Environment variable-based token auth with optional username
  - token_env: Name of env var containing the token
  - username: Optional username (defaults to x-access-token for GitHub)
- SshKey: SSH key-based authentication
  - key_path: Path to private key file
  - public_key: Optional path to public key
  - passphrase_env: Optional env var containing key passphrase

RemoteConfig extensions:
- branch: Optional branch name override (defaults to repo default)
- auth: Optional RemoteAuth configuration
- Proper serde skip_serializing_if for clean YAML output

Sync engine changes (sync/engine.rs):
- Add ResolvedAuth enum for runtime-resolved credentials
- resolve_auth(): Convert RemoteAuth config to resolved credentials
  by reading environment variables at sync time
- build_callbacks(): Create git2 RemoteCallbacks with credential handler
- clone_remote(): Clone with auth and optional branch selection
- sync_git_repo(): Fetch and fast-forward with authentication
- fetch_git_repo(): Authenticated fetch operation
- ensure_origin_url(): Update origin URL if remote config changed
- resolve_branch_name(): Determine branch from config or repo HEAD

Remote CLI command (remote.rs):
- Add flags: --branch, --auth, --token-env, --username, --ssh-key,
  --ssh-pubkey, --ssh-passphrase-env
- Add clear flags: --clear-branch, --clear-auth for set-url command
- validate_remote_flags(): Ensure auth/branch flags only used with git remotes
- parse_auth_from(): Parse CLI flags into RemoteAuth config
- has_auth_flags(): Check if any auth-related flags are set
- Display branch and auth info in list and status output
- Add test for parsing git auth CLI arguments

Module exports (sync/mod.rs):
- Export RemoteAuth for use by CLI and other modules

This enables workflows like:
  ms remote add origin https://github.com/user/skills.git \
    --type git --auth token --token-env GITHUB_TOKEN
  ms remote add origin git@github.com:user/skills.git \
    --type git --auth ssh --ssh-key ~/.ssh/id_ed25519

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,6 +27,23 @@ pub enum RemoteType {
     Git,
 }
 
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize, PartialEq, Eq)]
+#[serde(rename_all = "kebab-case", tag = "kind")]
+pub enum RemoteAuth {
+    SshKey {
+        key_path: PathBuf,
+        #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+        public_key: Option<PathBuf>,
+        #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+        passphrase_env: Option<String>,
+    },
+    Token {
+        token_env: String,
+        #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+        username: Option<String>,
+    },
+}
+
 impl RemoteType {
     pub fn from_str(value: &str) -> Result<Self> {
         match value {
@@ -130,6 +147,10 @@ pub struct RemoteConfig {
     #[serde(rename = "type")]
     pub remote_type: RemoteType,
     pub url: String,
+    #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub branch: Option<String>,
+    #[serde(default, skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
+    pub auth: Option<RemoteAuth>,
     #[serde(default = "default_remote_enabled")]
     pub enabled: bool,
     #[serde(default)]
@@ -152,6 +173,8 @@ impl RemoteConfig {
             name: name.into(),
             remote_type,
             url: url.into(),
+            branch: None,
+            auth: None,
             enabled: true,
             direction: SyncDirection::default(),
             auto_sync: false,
@@ -268,6 +291,8 @@ mod tests {
             name: "origin".to_string(),
             remote_type: RemoteType::FileSystem,
             url: "/tmp/skills".to_string(),
+            branch: None,
+            auth: None,
             enabled: true,
             direction: SyncDirection::PullOnly,
             auto_sync: false,
